title: Write ferrum_extlib_draw_img.md
description: CCSP lib_ccsp_draw_img: software rasterizer to memory buffer with PNG/PPM/raw/PDF output. Not in Ferrum stdlib. Design extlib module: reference implementation backend for draw extlib, pixel-exact comparison for visual regression testing, PNG/PPM/raw RGBA/PDF export, diff function for test assertions, documentation rendering from code.
